name: Tomato-Herb Mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in the container of a blender or food processor fitted with a steel blade.
2. Process for 1 minute.
3. Scrape sides with rubber spatula and process for an additional 30 seconds.
4. Transfer to a well-sealed container and allow to stand overnight before using.
Makes 1 ¼ cups.
